articles.title: Ukraine Asked For Donations Through Bitcoin, Ether And Tether
articles.description: The official tweeter account of Ukraine asked for donations through cryptocurrency on Saturday, just days after Russia invaded their country. They chose Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum(ETH), and Tether (USDT). Vice Prime Minister of the country, Mykhailo Fedorov, has confirmed that the call for donations was real and he asked people to “Stand with Ukraine.” Related Reading […]

articles.title: Ukraine accepts Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT donations amid ongoing war
articles.description: The Ukrainian government has reached out to the crypto community on Twitter to raise funds to support its civilians and troops.
